title: hyper's FOV changer
body:
change your fov WITH KEYBINDS! & go below 30 and above 110 FOV

The mod is made for editors from Universe Editing & related communities; can greatly improve workflow when used with DaCubeKing's keyframeable FOV fork for ReplayMod.

default keybinds are R for increasing FOV, T for decreasing FOV and i for displaying a slider to adjust the FOV change speed.

can all be changed in controls
